note:
Zero HOT setups. Zero WARM setups. You gotta be kidding me. When’s the last time we went a day without a single squeeze idea on our radar? It’s like the market went out for a long lunch and forgot to come back. But you know what? That might just be the setup we need to see. **When there's nothing on fire, it means the market is catching its breath—a coiled spring waiting for its next move.** Are we ready for it?

Big picture right now: we're in neutral, and the market isn’t tipping its hand. Bonds are flat, tech ain't shooting the lights out, and small-caps are stuck in mud. Even oil prices are taking a breather after that massive run. The dollar? It’s not screaming higher, but it’s not breaking down either. The indecision across asset classes is deafening—which is why there’s nothing hitting HOT territory today. The market needs a reason to move. And when it does, you’ll want to be strapped in. Risk is on. Full stop.

Flipping it over to the portfolio—you're already sitting on some **monster** wins here, so don’t sleep on locking in profits. $COIN, $MP, and $UUUU have all doubled up, and we’ve already sold half of those positions. That’s just textbook execution. And $UAMY, oh, you’re doubling your money on rare earth metals? That’s leadership, folks. What’s the market telling us? On a day when there’s literally NOTHING scoring in the HOT or WARM zones, we’re still rolling in 2x plays. The bears? They’ve got nothing. They haven’t had anything all year.

Now, focus on what’s still actionable. $BTU is waking up again, even though it’s already given us 2x. Coal isn’t sexy—it’s not AI, it’s not crypto, it’s not EV batteries—but that’s exactly why we love it. Same for $AG. Yes, we’re short silver. Let me say that again: SHORT SILVER. How much more contrarian can you get? If this cracks below another major support level here, it’s lights out for the silver bulls. Meanwhile, $ETHA, $BLSH, and $SBET—our crypto plays—are still quietly grinding higher in the background. Don’t let the lack of sizzle fool you. These are the trades you want when the market’s uncertain.

What’s on the watchlist today? All eyes on China. $NIO and $LI are still moving with purpose, even as broader EM names look like they’re stuck in neutral. When the capital starts flowing back into risk, they’ll be at the front of the line. And don’t sleep on uranium. $UUUU and $SMR are holding up like champs, and we know what happens when this group starts heating up. It’s like a freight train—you don’t want to be late.

The tape is telling us to chill—for now. But make no mistake: this kind of quiet doesn’t last. Keep your stops tight, make sure your wins are locked, and have your list of setups on standby. When things wake up, they’re gonna wake up big.
